samples.scenario_label: Unknown with low confidence and explicit readiness degradation
unknown_reason_signals: One or more data sources were degraded or unavailable, which reduced confidence.
Path context confidence is low, so route or policy context may be incomplete.
Bounded checks were inconclusive or incomplete for this time window.

operator_explanation.safety_note: Unknown is not the same as allowed. A missing deny signal is not proof of allow.
